violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 150 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Sanitizer was replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the hot hold unit have an accumulation of food and other debris. Shelving to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
The hot hold door gasket was observed not tight fighting. There was a visible gap in the bottom door. Gasket to be fixed to be tight fitting. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer have an accumulation of old food debris. Freezer to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The vents above the prep unit and inside of the walk-in have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
